title: Level 47
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 47: "Interrogative Infohazard"}} {{Class 1||class=1e - Environmental|hexagon=E|stability=Unstable|entity=Memetic Hazards}} {{Blurimage|file=Thestairsbetween.jpg|caption=What if I told you that this is an image of '''Level 47'''?}} ==Description== Did you know that '''Level 47''' consists of a complex, interconnected set of empty drywall rooms filled with scattered half-walls, stairwells, and dead-ends? Are you aware that linear space is distorted in the level, making it virtually impossible to exactly navigate, or even return to one's previous position? Have you heard that sound also behaves strangely within the level, dampening most noises to the point of near-silence? What if I told you that '''Level 47''' has an anomalous property that converts any information pertaining to it into a question? Isn't it strange that one is unable to write any information about the level without it being in the form of a question, while the writer does not appear to notice? Wouldn't one conclude that '''Level 47''' presents a serious memetic hazard and a potential widespread leak of this anomalous property? Did you know that the cause of the anomalous memetic properties of this level is unknown, as the level itself does not appear to differ greatly from other levels? Have you heard that wanderers often preserve little to no memory of their time within '''Level 47''' after exiting it? ==Colonies and Outposts== Are there any colonies or outposts on this level? ==Addendum==
Kauer Research Organization
''Did you know that the following text documents an exploration of '''Level 47''' carried out by Kauer Researcher Bennett, and operated by Exploration Captain Holden, transcribed verbatim?''

'''Researcher Bennett:''' Where the hell am I? Didn’t you say I would end up in- '''Captain Holden:''' Bennett, is everything alright? Where are you? You’re off our radar. '''Researcher Bennett:''' Can you hear me? Hold on.
''(small pause as Researcher Bennett presumably adjusts his receiver)''
Alright, how do I sound, Captain? '''Captain Holden:''' We hear you loud and clear, Bennett. Can you describe your surroundings? '''Researcher Bennett:''' Uh, well, have you ever seen those empty houses, before they’re furnished? Can you picture that, with a sort-of dreamlike feel to it? '''Captain Holden:''' Strange.
''(off to the side):'' Do we have an environment like this logged in the database? '''Researcher Bennett:''' ''(pause)'' Captain? '''Captain Holden:''' We’re trying to locate you. ''(murmuring)''
It doesn’t look like we know where you are. Is there anything near you that sticks out to you? '''Researcher Bennett:''' Haven’t I already said that it’s empty? '''Captain Holden:''' No need to get agitated, Bennett; I understand you’re phased. '''Researcher Bennett:''' Did I seem agitated?
''(shouts):'' Is anyone there? '''Captain Holden:''' Is everything alright? '''Researcher Bennett:''' Isn’t this place strange? '''Captain Holden:''' Well, I can’t see what you’re seeing. Can you describe its architecture? '''Researcher Bennett:''' “Basic” would be an overstatement, wouldn’t it? I’ve already said that it’s like an empty house, yeah? Would it make sense if I said that there are staircases going upward that lead to nowhere, with connecting rooms containing similar oddities, Captain? '''Captain Holden:''' I… Yes, I believe that would make sense. Are you feeling alright, Bennett? '''Researcher Bennett:''' Can you please hurry up, sir? Can’t you tell I’m not exactly enjoying myself here — wherever I am? '''Captain Holden:''' We’re doing the best we can. ''(murmuring)'' Just hold on. '''Researcher Bennett:''' ''(quietly, presumably to self)'' Freaky, right? '''Captain Holden:''' Something is off.
''(indecipherable conversation)'' …Yes, exactly. It’s not right.
Alright, Bennett, can you hear me? '''Researcher Bennett:''' Loud and clear, Captain. '''Captain Holden:''' I’d like to ask you a couple questions. '''Researcher Bennett:''' Yeah, that’s okay. Why? '''Captain Holden:''' A simple hunch; now: What is your name? '''Researcher Bennett:''' ''(pause)'' Bennett, sir; ███████ Bennett. May I question the intent of this? '''Captain Holden:''' ''(quietly, presumably to self)'' Alright, noted.
Now, can you describe your current surroundings? '''Researcher Bennett:''' I already answered that question. '''Captain Holden:''' …Interesting. ''(pause)''
''(quietly, presumably writing)'' Does… not… apply… ''(indecipherable)'' '''Researcher Bennett:''' Can you tell me what this is about? '''Captain Holden:''' Bennett, I ask that you answer the question for research purposes. '''Researcher Bennett:''' Roger that, Captain. I've said that the environment appears to be empty and unfurnished, with no remarkable features aside from the occasional staircase, yeah? Have I added that it smells vaguely of… lime? '''Captain Holden:''' Bennett, can you describe the environment in the form of a statement, and not as an inquiry? '''Researcher Bennett:''' Is that… not what I’ve been doing? '''Captain Holden:''' ''(pause)'' How about that.
==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== *Did you know that one can enter this level from various doorways in [[Level 4]] and [[Level 4.3]]? *Have you heard that certain areas in [[Level 46]] may lead to this level? ===Exits=== *What if I told you that certain doorways and stairwells on this level may lead to [[Level 0]], [[Level 4]], and [[Level 4.3]]? __NOTOC__ __NOEDITSECTION__ ----
